docket_entries.description: ORDER OFF CALENDAR CASE DISMISSED FEB-24-17 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE GRANTED

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF REPORTS THAT THE CASE HAS SETTLED. DEFENDANT WILL MAIL A CHECK TO THE PLAINTIFF WITHIN THIRTY DAYS. PURSUANT TO THE COURTS ORDER THE MATTER WILL BE SET FOR A PROGRESS REPORT TO APRI-26-17 AT 3:30PM. IF THE PAYMENT HAS BEEN MADE AND THE CHECK HAS CLEARED THE PLAINTIFF DOES NOT HAVE TO APPEAR. IF PAYMENT IS NOT MADE PLAINTIFF IS TO APPEAR AND THE COURT WILL REINSTATE THE CASE. PLAINTIFF SBEEN AJMAL IS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL ENTIRE ACTION (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2017 - CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION TO FEB-24-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT IS NOT PERMITTED TO APPEAR BY DECLARATION. DEFENDANT MUST PERSONALLY APPEAR OR REQUEST PERMISSION TO APPEAR BY COURT CALL. PLAINTIFF SBEEN AJMAL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE APPEARED BY DECLARATION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 8/31/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL APPEARACNE AT SMALL CLAIMS TRAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE SERVED JAN-17-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO PLAINTIFF AJMAL, SBEEN
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PROGRESS REPORT PURSUANT IT THE FEB-24-17 COURT ORDER HEARING SET FOR APR-26-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE SERVED OCT-28-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED OF DEFENDANT'S COMPENDIUM OF TRIAL EXHIBIT (SERVED BY OVERNIGHT DELIVERY) FILED BY DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE AS TO PLAINTIFF AJMAL, SBEEN
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR (BY SHEILA MAHDAVI, CAPITAL-1 LEGAL SPECIALIST) FILED BY DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AJMAL, SBEEN AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-17-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
